---
title: "ChronicleEvent"
---
<!-- DO NOT EDIT! This file was auto-generated by crates/build/re_types_builder/src/codegen/docs/website.rs -->

A Chronicle SaaS event with source, type, and optional JSON payload.

Events are the core data type in Chronicle. Each event represents a
single occurrence from a SaaS source (e.g. a Stripe payment, a support
ticket, a product page view). Events are logged at entity paths that
encode the entity hierarchy: `/{org}/{entity_type}/{entity_id}/{source}/{event_type}`.

## Fields
### Required
* `source`: [`ChronicleSource`](../components/chronicle_source.md)
* `event_type`: [`ChronicleEventType`](../components/chronicle_event_type.md)

### Recommended
* `topic`: [`ChronicleTopic`](../components/chronicle_topic.md)

### Optional
* `payload`: [`ChroniclePayload`](../components/chronicle_payload.md)
* `color`: [`Color`](../components/color.md)
* `label`: [`Text`](../components/text.md)


## Can be shown in
* [TextLogView](../views/text_log_view.md)
* [ChronicleTimelineView](../views/chronicle_timeline_view.md)
* [DataframeView](../views/dataframe_view.md)
